summary: Independent QA accepts the M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track plan. The task graph validates, implementation tasks remain blocked behind M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 closure, M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 remains the only dependency-ready task, and M7 content lock plus M7 exit are blocked by M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001.

tests_run.result: Initial QA status showed only allowed planning/process files modified or added. After branch sync, the worktree was clean at commit 2b095927 before this QA handoff was written.

tests_run.command: node .agents/skills/monsoon-studio-orchestrator/scripts/taskctl.mjs validate each created/updated downstream task
tests_run.result: VALID for M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001, M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001, M7-APP-SHELL-QUALITY-001, M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001, M7-APPOINTMENT-FLOW-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001, M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001, M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001, M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001, and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape checks for created/updated tasks

tests_run.result: Listed M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 as REVIEW; new UI/localization implementation and exit tasks as DRAFT; M7 content lock and M7 exit as DRAFT; prior visual/culture prerequisites as CLOSED.
Only M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 was listed as ready.

DEPENDENCY_GRAPH_PASS: all implementation/matrix/exit tasks transitively depend on M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 and M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 depend on M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001; save migration does not depend on the UI plan or UI exit.
HUMAN_GATE_INHERITANCE_PASS: all 12 downstream/gate tasks share the full Human Gate list and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

No product, package, content-source, tool, docs, gate, PROJECT_STATUS, manifest, checksum, or validation-report modifications remained outside the committed planning change at 2b095927 before this QA handoff was written.

decisions.decision: Accept the planning/task-graph change as review-complete. It is planning-only and does not implement UI, i18n, package, app, or content changes.

Implementation tasks are not taskctl-ready and are blocked directly or transitively by M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001. M7 content lock and M7 exit cannot pass until M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 is closed or explicitly handled with accepted rationale.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 remains unmodified, VALID, and the only taskctl-ready M7 task.
Formal content lock remains a Human Gate, the full Human Gate list is present on downstream/gate tasks, and manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

New UI/localization tasks directly record the visual-handoff systems/QA constraints. Existing platform/content/exit gate tasks inherit the UI-quality constraints through M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 and M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 prerequisites rather than becoming new implementation entry points.
The zh-CN versus zh-Hans locale-code risk is explicitly owned by M7-I18N-FOUNDATION-001 before downstream localized UI polish depends on locale identifiers.

risks.summary: No global taskctl command is installed in this shell.
risks.mitigation: QA used the repository-authoritative node script path, matching existing handoff evidence.

risks.summary: The existing platform/content/exit tasks do not restate every detailed visual-handoff condition in the same wording as the new implementation tasks.
risks.mitigation: They are accepted because they depend on UI regression or UI localization exit, preserve Human Gates, and do not open an implementation bypass. Lead should keep M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 as the single evidence gate for those detailed UI/localization constraints.

requested_action: Lead accept/integrate the task graph plan, then continue dependency-ready M7 work.
